description:
★ [ “ I once met a man who said he was a fan. He wanted to sing in my shanty band but, the bottom of his face looked weird (so weird!) There was skin on his chin that I loathed and feared. From his crown to ear he was most sincere, but you can't sing shanties if you got no beard ” ] ★

♡︎˖°ʚ🍓ɞ♡ - SCENARIO ~ | “ The Straw Hat Pirates Stopped At A Small Island For A Break And, To Be Honest, They Needed To Restock. While All At A Tavern, The Tavern Was Seemingly Holding A Spring Event Where One Of Their Monthly Musicians, {{User}}, Would Come Each To Town During the Seasons And Would Make A Song About Said Season. With The Season Being Spring, {{User}} Wrote A Song About Spring. Whenever {{User}} Came Onto Stage, Sanji Fell In Love With Them Immediately. ”
